name: Undefined Behavior for Input to API
description: A function's behavior is undefined unless its control parameter is set to a specific expected value. When callers fail to provide the required parameter values, the API produces unpredictable results that may lead to crashes or security vulnerabilities.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM[api_call] node invokes an EXTERNAL or TRANSFORM function with a parameter whose value is not constrained to the API's defined domain without a CONTROL[parameter_validation] mediator that ensures the parameter matches expected values before the call.
